content:
We have managed to compile the kernel, but we are unable to get it to work inside of a VM.
We are trying to create a bootable ISO and run in inside of a fresh linux install.

This is the thread we used to try to solve this problem: https://superuser.com/questions/1613122/how-to-make-an-iso-file-from-bzimage-and-initramfs

And it kind of works but when we run it on a fresh linux install the VM ends in a reboot loop.

image.png
